recap:
- Provisioned throughput offers consistent and predictable performance through dedicated compute resources.
- It helps meet Service Level Agreement (SLA) requirements for application performance.
- Ensures compliance with data isolation and security controls for regulated industries.
- Enhances production reliability by eliminating cold starts and resource contention.
- Provides stable response times even during variable load conditions.
- Enables cost predictability with fixed capacity pricing for accurate budget forecasting.
